description: Social network analysis is a social scientific approach examining individuals as embedded in networks of social relations. Covers the fundamentals of network thinking, network tools, and the analysis and presentation of social network data. Direct practice with network data using software R.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: Junior standing and (C&E SOC/​SOC  360,STAT 301,STAT 371,ECON 310,PSYCH 210,GEOG 360,STAT/​MATH  310, or GEN BUS 303)
